hero.fallbackBio: Custom tattoos, honest craft. Every piece starts with a conversation.

designs.title: Available designs
designs.subtitle: Original flash, ready for skin. Reserve a piece or try it on first.
designs.empty: No designs published yet — tell us what you have in mind instead.

artists.title: The artists
artists.subtitle: Meet the hands behind the ink.

artist.noDesigns: {{name}} works on custom pieces only — bring your idea.

tryOn.title: Try it on
tryOn.description: Upload a photo of the spot and place the design on your skin.
tryOn.uploadHint: A well-lit photo of the placement area works best. It stays on your device.
tryOn.downloadError: Couldn't export the preview. Please try again.
tryOn.gateText: We'll send you this preview and sizing options.
tryOn.unlockedToast: You're in — download your preview or book the design.
tryOn.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

intake.title: Custom tattoo brief
intake.description: Tell us about the piece you're dreaming of and we'll get back to you shortly.
intake.name: Name
intake.describePlaceholder: Style, references, meaning — anything that helps us picture it…
intake.successBody: Thank you, {{name}} — we'll read it carefully and reply to {{email}} soon.
intake.error: We couldn't send your brief. Please try again.
